div.p: Dmitry Vyukov's algorithm with per-slot sequence numbers

g.text: 4. Producers A, C, D CAS fails

ul.li: seq == position → Slot EMPTY, ready for producer
seq == position + 1 → Slot has DATA, ready for consumer
seq == position + capacity → Slot CONSUMED, next cycle
Never wraps within buffer cycle (64-bit = 584 years at 1B msg/s)

text.tspan: Writes to tail invalidate core owning head.
Tail remains hot in Producer L1.
Head remains hot in Consumer L1.
